label: Your Account

items.text: Upload a profile photo — tap the avatar circle on the Account tab to pick an image.

items: Download a copy of everything you've added to Rhozly as a single JSON file — homes, plants, plans, journals, tasks, and ailments. GDPR-aligned.

label: Shopping
items: New Quantity field on shopping list items — record '×3 stakes' or '×500g bone meal' to keep your list precise.

label: Reports
items: Audit Log now has a Print / PDF button alongside the CSV export — save your AI usage history in any format that works for you.

label: Release Notes
items: Release notes can now carry 'Try it →' links — tap the link in a note to jump straight to the feature.
